pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines PROJECT_DIR as /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/webapp and creates all project directories there.
task.json description and verifier.py both state that FLASK_DEBUG=1 and FLASK_ENV=development must be set in the API override configuration.
task.json instructions and verifier.py enforce mapping host port 5678 for the API debug port and 5432 for the database.
task.json instructions call for mounting ./api into /app, and the verifier checks for a bind mount targeting /app.
task.json specifies overriding the API command to run `flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5000 --reload`, and verifier.py looks for 'flask run' plus --reload.

privileged_info_summary: compose_override_dev@1 executes inside /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/webapp where setup_task.sh writes the entire docker-compose stack locally (Flask API, nginx, database init scripts), so no external dataset is downloaded, and the task instructions plus verifier logic require the override to set FLASK_DEBUG=1, FLASK_ENV=development, mount ./api into /app, run flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5000 --reload, and expose ports 5678 (API debug) and 5432 (DB).
